predictions.rationale: Quantile grid drawn from the model's conditional distribution given returns through 2026-06-18; central path modestly higher, bands scaled by horizon.
Quantile grid drawn from the model's conditional distribution given returns through 2026-06-18; central path roughly flat, bands scaled by horizon.
Quantile grid drawn from the model's conditional distribution given returns through 2026-06-18; central path modestly higher, bands scaled by horizon.

As of the June 18, 2026 close I read the tape as roughly flat over the next month. Retrieved coverage this week centers on the Fed's next move and steady mega-cap earnings; no scheduled catalyst before the h=5 horizon resolves. Realized vol has drifted lower, so I kept the central path near flat but widened the lower tail to respect headline risk into the h=21 window. Nothing in the narrative justified a directional bet beyond a small drift.

predictions.rationale: Computed 20-day realized vol and a short-horizon momentum score on the panel through 2026-06-18. Realized vol sits below its trailing median and the trend state is mildly positive, so I nudged the median modestly higher and set band width from the empirical 20-day return distribution rather than a constant. Widened h=21 bands to cover the fatter monthly tail I measured on history.
